CustomField.formula:
IF(ISBLANK(Development_address__c),"-Add Development" &BR(),"") &
IF(TEXT(Income_Level__c) <> TEXT(Max_Income_Level__c),"-Income Level Does Not Match Max Income Level" &BR(),"")&
IF(AND(TEXT(HOMEtracker__Number_of_Bedrooms__c)="0",Maximum_Household_Size__c=2),"", IF((VALUE(TEXT(HOMEtracker__Number_of_Bedrooms__c))*2) <> Maximum_Household_Size__c,"-Max Household Size is Not Two People Per Bedroom" &BR(),""))&
IF(AND(OR(RecordType.DeveloperName = "Rental_Unit", RecordType.DeveloperName = "Homeownership"), TEXT(HOMEtracker__Property_Type__c) = ""),"-Add Property Type" &BR(),"") &
IF(ISBLANK(HOMEtracker__City__c),"-Add City" &BR(),"") & IF(TEXT(HOMEtracker__Number_of_Bedrooms__c)="","-Add Number of Bedrooms" &BR(),"") & IF(TEXT(HOMEtracker__Number_of_Bathrooms__c)="","-Add Number of Bathrooms" &BR(),"") & IF(AND(RecordType.DeveloperName = "Homeownership", OR(HOMEtracker__List_Price__c = 0,ISBLANK(HOMEtracker__List_Price__c))),"-Add List Price" &BR(),"") & IF(AND(RecordType.DeveloperName = "Rental_Unit", OR (HOMEtracker__Monthly_Rent__c = 0, ISBLANK(HOMEtracker__Monthly_Rent__c))),"-Add Monthly Rent" &BR(),"") & IF(OR(AND(RecordType.DeveloperName = "Homeownership", HOMEtracker__Current_HOA_Condo_Fees__c > 0),RecordType.DeveloperName = "Rental_Unit"),"","-Add Current HOA/Condo Fee or Lot Rent" &BR() )& IF(TEXT(Max_Income_Level__c)="","-Add Max Income Level" &BR(),"") & IF(TEXT(Floor_unit_is_located_on__c)="","-Add Floor Unit is Located On" &BR(),"") & IF(TEXT(Age_Restriction__c)="","-Add Age-Restriction" &BR(),"") & IF(TEXT(Pets_allowed__c)="","-Add Pets Allowed" &BR(),"") & IF(AND(TEXT(Pets_allowed__c)="Yes",ISBLANK(Pet_fee__c)),"-Add Pet Listing Info & Fees" &BR(),"") & IF(ISBLANK(Additional_Parking_Fee__c),"-Add Parking Listing Info & Fees" &BR(),"") &
IF(TEXT(Lottery_Number_for_Priority__c)="","-Add Lottery Number for Priority" &BR(),"") & IF(TEXT(Listing_Type__c)="","-Add Listing Type" &BR(),"") & IF(TEXT(Listing_Stage__c)="","-Add Listing Stage" &BR(),"") & IF(Maximum_Household_Size__c=0,"-Add Maximum Household Size" &BR(),"") & IF(AND(RecordType.DeveloperName = "Rental_Unit",ISBLANK(Utilities__c)),"-Add Utilities Amount" &BR(),"") & IF(Property_Images__c = 0,"-Add Property Images" &BR(),"") &
IF(AND(Municipality_Live_Work_Preference__c = FALSE, ISPICKVAL(Listing_Stage__c, "Region and bedroom/household size restricted") = TRUE),"-No Regional Pref, Listing Stage Cannot be Region Restricted" &BR(),"") &
IF(Development_address__r.Municipality_Name__c != Municipality_Name__c,"-Development Municipality is Different from Property Municipality" &BR(),"")
CustomField.label: Data Check
